claims.description: The V2 freeform Mentor route opener is authoritative for learning_sessions.raw_input and is sent through the existing subject-resolution, session-creation, outbox, stream, and event-persistence path before later input.
Allocated session IDs are backfilled into route state and restoration reconciles canonical transcript plus deterministic outbox state.
The deterministic mentor-opener:<sessionId> key and opener marker prevent remount, retry, outbox-drain, and server-replay duplication while preserving learner/Mentor ordering before a Yes follow-up.
The real persisted-session regression verifies question and declarative openers, Yes follow-up, exact-once ordering, and non-empty Mentor replies without implementation-call assertions.
The real persistence path covers delayed subject creation, retry/restart replay, an already-created session, already-persisted hydration, and downstream transcript rehydration.
Immutable machine-readable RED, GREEN, production-only REVERT, and RESTORE outputs plus the complete validation and adversarial-review record are preserved.

A comprehensive independent Opus review found no actionable issue and verified persistence, idempotency, ordering, and non-Mentor isolation; origin/main 3b0fa933 merged without conflict and the complete verification set plus final GREEN passed afterward.
